mapper.insert: INSERT INTO interview_session (user_id, position, round, difficulty, question_count, current_question, question_ids, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{position}, #{round}, #{difficulty}, #{questionCount}, #{currentQuestion}, #{questionIds}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE interview_session SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE interview_session SET current_question = #{currentQuestion} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE interview_session SET question_ids = #{questionIds} WHERE id = #{id}
